pattern: Treating open source as permissionless copy-paste
countermeasure: LicenseGate before integration; provenance ledger before reuse.

pattern: Publishing secret findings in public PRs/issues
countermeasure: Redact by default; never expose actual tokens or private credentials.

pattern: StackOverflow snippet reuse without attribution/share-alike review
countermeasure: Use explanation/pattern-first mode; direct snippet only with attribution and compatibility.

pattern: Ignoring rate limits/backoff and causing API throttling
countermeasure: Cache, conditional requests, one-minute semantic interval for StackExchange.
